name: hybrid-loops
description: Hybrid loops: a design pattern where LLM judgment and deterministic code alternate in a cycle that's mutually generative as well as mutually constraining — each half produces the working surface the other operates over. Stacks at runtime AND during development (LLM-critic transcripts → patches → runtime). Diagnostic-first skill plus three MCP servers for the recurring primitives: cal_log, metacog, schemaforge.
